mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity_log ( actor_emp_id, actor_name, action_type, target_menu, target_emp_ids, before_data, after_data, result, error_msg, ip_addr, log_date ) VALUES ( #{actorEmpId}, #{actorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{actionType}, #{targetMenu, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetEmpIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beforeData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{afterData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{result}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ipAddr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
